name: Marcel
intro: Marcel, the Soul Photographer, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang , and is accompanied by Clemar.

abilities.name: Platinum Snap
abilities.description: CC Marcel's split soul. Clemar, enters the camera to freeze the moment. Marcel's Basic Attack deal 50 (+40% Total Physical Attack) (+40% Total Physical Defense) (+40% Total Magic Defense) Physical Damage . His Extra HP is converted into 1.5% Hybrid Defense. Clemar automatically snaps photos of nearby enemy heroes, causing a brief Frozen Moment and dealing 20 + 5% of their Max HP True Damage (triggers Attack Effects). It also grants a shield of the same value to Marcel and a nearby allied hero. Cooldown: 12s per target.

abilities.name: Framed Moment
abilities.description: AOE Clemar focuses on an area around Marcel, slowing enemy heroes within 60%. After 2.5s, he completes the shot, dealing 350 (+50% Total Physical Attack) (+120% Total Physical Defense) (+120% Total Magic Defense) Physical Damage to enemies within.

abilities.name: Tracking Shot
abilities.description: Speed Up Artist inspiration time! Marcel enters Tracking Haste state for 3s, gaining 15% Movement Speed . This bonus increases to 75% when moving toward an enemy hero. Use Again : Marcel dashes in the target direction, leaving a framing phantom behind while the Framed Moment area remains at the original location.

abilities.name: Golden Hour
abilities.description: CC Marcel and Clemar perform a joint shoot. After a short delay, Clemar takes a wide-angle shot of the target area for 2s. During this time, Marcel enters Tracking Haste state while inside the area. All other units are put into a Frozen Moment and are immune to all effects except from Marcel. All projectiles are also frozen and will continue after a delay (targeted projectiles will deal 50% damage). Golden Hour resets the cooldown of Platinum Snap for each enemy hero. Allied heroes with the Platinum Snap shield can move freely within the area.
